mapper.select: SELECT cd.code_value AS value, cd.code_name AS label FROM code_group cg INNER JOIN code_detail cd ON cd.code_group_seq = cg.code_group_seq WHERE cg.code_group_id = 'A0002' AND cg.use_yn = 'Y' AND (cg.status IS NULL OR cg.status = 'ACTIVE') AND cd.use_yn = 'Y' AND (cd.status IS NULL OR cd.status = 'ACTIVE') ORDER BY cd.sort_order ASC, cd.code_detail_seq ASC

SELECT b.notice_board_seq, b.category_code, CASE WHEN cg.code_group_seq IS NOT NULL THEN cd.code_name END AS category_name, b.title, b.content, b.writer_member_seq, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(wm.nickname), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(b.writer_name), ''), wm.member_id) AS writer_name, COALESCE( CASE WHEN wm.profile_image_file_seq IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('/api/files/view/', wm.profile_image_file_seq) END, wm.profile_image_url ) AS writer_profile_image_url, b.view_count, b.like_count, b.dislike_count, b.comment_count, b.comment_like_count, b.comment_report_count, b.report_count, b.show_yn, b.highlight_yn, b.comment_allowed_yn AS commentAllowedYn, b.reply_allowed_yn AS replyAllowedYn, b.pin_on_free_board_yn AS pinOnFreeBoardYn, DATE_FORMAT(b.create_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS create_dt, DATE_FORMAT(b.modify_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS modify_dt FROM notice_board b LEFT JOIN code_detail cd ON cd.code_value = b.category_code AND cd.use_yn = 'Y' AND (cd.status IS NULL OR cd.status = 'ACTIVE') LEFT JOIN code_group cg ON cg.code_group_seq = cd.code_group_seq AND cg.code_group_id = 'A0002' AND cg.use_yn = 'Y' AND (cg.status IS NULL OR cg.status = 'ACTIVE') LEFT JOIN member wm ON wm.member_seq = b.writer_member_seq
ORDER BY b.highlight_yn DESC, b.notice_board_seq DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT b.notice_board_seq, b.category_code, CASE WHEN cg.code_group_seq IS NOT NULL THEN cd.code_name END AS category_name, b.title, b.content, b.writer_member_seq, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(wm.nickname), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(b.writer_name), ''), wm.member_id) AS writer_name, COALESCE( CASE WHEN wm.profile_image_file_seq IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('/api/files/view/', wm.profile_image_file_seq) END, wm.profile_image_url ) AS writer_profile_image_url, b.view_count, b.like_count, b.dislike_count, b.comment_count, b.comment_like_count, b.comment_report_count, b.report_count, b.show_yn, b.highlight_yn, b.comment_allowed_yn AS commentAllowedYn, b.reply_allowed_yn AS replyAllowedYn, b.pin_on_free_board_yn AS pinOnFreeBoardYn, DATE_FORMAT(b.create_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS create_dt, DATE_FORMAT(b.modify_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS modify_dt FROM notice_board b LEFT JOIN code_detail cd ON cd.code_value = b.category_code AND cd.use_yn = 'Y' AND (cd.status IS NULL OR cd.status = 'ACTIVE') LEFT JOIN code_group cg ON cg.code_group_seq = cd.code_group_seq AND cg.code_group_id = 'A0002' AND cg.use_yn = 'Y' AND (cg.status IS NULL OR cg.status = 'ACTIVE') LEFT JOIN member wm ON wm.member_seq = b.writer_member_seq WHERE b.notice_board_seq = #{noticeBoardSeq} AND b.use_yn = 'Y'

SELECT b.notice_board_seq, b.category_code, CASE WHEN cg.code_group_seq IS NOT NULL THEN cd.code_name END AS category_name, b.title, b.content, b.writer_member_seq, COALESCE(NULLIF(TRIM(wm.nickname), ''), NULLIF(TRIM(b.writer_name), ''), wm.member_id) AS writer_name, COALESCE( CASE WHEN wm.profile_image_file_seq IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('/api/files/view/', wm.profile_image_file_seq) END, wm.profile_image_url ) AS writer_profile_image_url, b.view_count, b.like_count, b.dislike_count, b.comment_count, b.comment_like_count, b.comment_report_count, b.report_count, b.show_yn, b.highlight_yn, b.comment_allowed_yn AS commentAllowedYn, b.reply_allowed_yn AS replyAllowedYn, b.pin_on_free_board_yn AS pinOnFreeBoardYn, DATE_FORMAT(b.create_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS create_dt, DATE_FORMAT(b.modify_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS modify_dt FROM notice_board b LEFT JOIN code_detail cd ON cd.code_value = b.category_code AND cd.use_yn = 'Y' AND (cd.status IS NULL OR cd.status = 'ACTIVE') LEFT JOIN code_group cg ON cg.code_group_seq = cd.code_group_seq AND cg.code_group_id = 'A0002' AND cg.use_yn = 'Y' AND (cg.status IS NULL OR cg.status = 'ACTIVE') LEFT JOIN member wm ON wm.member_seq = b.writer_member_seq WHERE b.show_yn = 'Y' AND b.use_yn = 'Y' AND b.pin_on_free_board_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY b.notice_board_seq DESC LIMIT 30
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notice_board ( category_code, title, content, writer_member_seq, writer_name, view_count, like_count, dislike_count, comment_count, comment_like_count, comment_report_count, report_count, show_yn, highlight_yn, comment_allowed_yn, reply_allowed_yn, pin_on_free_board_yn, use_yn, create_dt, create_id, create_ip, modify_dt, modify_id, modify_ip ) VALUES ( #{categoryCode}, #{title}, #{content}, #{writerMemberSeq}, #{writerName}, #{viewCount}, #{likeCount}, #{dislikeCount}, #{commentCount}, #{commentLikeCount}, #{commentReportCount}, #{reportCount}, #{showYn}, #{highlightYn}, #{commentAllowedYn}, #{replyAllowedYn}, #{pinOnFreeBoardYn}, 'Y', NOW(), #{createId}, #{createIp}, NOW(), #{modifyId}, #{modifyIp} )
mapper.update: UPDATE notice_board SET category_code = #{categoryCode}, title = #{title}, content = #{content}, show_yn = #{showYn}, highlight_yn = #{highlightYn}, comment_allowed_yn = #{commentAllowedYn}, reply_allowed_yn = #{replyAllowedYn}, pin_on_free_board_yn = #{pinOnFreeBoardYn}, modify_dt = NOW(), modify_id = #{modifyId}, modify_ip = #{modifyIp} WHERE notice_board_seq = #{noticeBoardSeq} AND use_yn = 'Y'
UPDATE notice_board SET use_yn = 'N', modify_dt = NOW() WHERE notice_board_seq = #{noticeBoardSeq} AND use_yn = 'Y'
UPDATE notice_board SET view_count = IFNULL(view_count, 0) + 1 WHERE notice_board_seq = #{noticeBoardSeq} AND use_yn = 'Y'
UPDATE notice_board SET like_count = IFNULL(like_count, 0) + 1 WHERE notice_board_seq = #{noticeBoardSeq} AND use_yn = 'Y'
UPDATE notice_board SET dislike_count = IFNULL(dislike_count, 0) + 1 WHERE notice_board_seq = #{noticeBoardSeq} AND use_yn = 'Y'
UPDATE notice_board SET report_count = IFNULL(report_count, 0) + 1 WHERE notice_board_seq = #{noticeBoardSeq} AND use_yn = 'Y'
UPDATE notice_board SET comment_count = IFNULL(comment_count, 0) + 1 WHERE notice_board_seq = #{noticeBoardSeq} AND use_yn = 'Y'
UPDATE notice_board SET comment_count = GREATEST(IFNULL(comment_count, 0) + #{delta}, 0) WHERE notice_board_seq = #{noticeBoardSeq} AND use_yn = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO board_action_log ( board_kind, target_kind, target_seq, action_type, member_seq, member_id, client_ip, create_dt ) VALUES ( #{boardKind}, #{targetKind}, #{targetSeq}, #{actionType}, #{memberSeq}, #{memberId}, #{clientIp}, NOW() )
